title: Marathon Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Marathon Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Marathon Realty in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Marathon Realty:
Marathon Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marathon Realty!
